Miracle (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $64,378,093Details
International Box Office $96,612
Worldwide Box Office $64,474,705
Further financial details...

Opening Weekend:$19,377,577 (30.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,605 opening theaters/2,755 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $123,987,442

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 6th, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
Video Release: May 18th, 2004 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for language and some rough sports action.
Running Time: 135 minutes

Subgenre: Sports Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
